notes: Real lockfile generated by 'conan lock create conanfile.py' with Conan 2.28.1 on Linux/gcc-12/Release/x86_64. Direct runtime: zlib/1.3.1, bzip2/1.0.8 (both leaf nodes). cmake/3.27.9 and ninja/1.12.1 are in build_requires (from tool_requires in conanfile.py) and MUST NOT appear in Mend's tree. python_requires is empty ([]) because cmake-conan is not available on Conan Center v2 — Mend must accept an empty python_requires array without error and must not surface phantom python_requires entries. This probe uses a different package set from the conanfile.txt tool_requires probe (bzip2 instead of poco) and uses the Conan 2.x Python API conanfile.py rather than conanfile.txt.
python_requires_note: python_requires was the primary target feature. The canonical Conan Center python_requires helper recipe (cmake-conan) is not published on ConanCenter v2. The lockfile python_requires array is therefore empty. The probe exercises: (1) tool_requires exclusion via conanfile.py 2.x API, and (2) correct handling of empty python_requires — Mend must not error on an empty list and must not add phantom entries.

failure_modes_exercised: tool_requires leaking from conanfile.py 2.x API into runtime tree
python_requires appearing as a runtime dependency
empty python_requires array causing a parse error or phantom dependency
conanfile.py not detected (UA only scanning conanfile.txt)
empty tree due to conanfile.py parser not invoked
